semantic.role: End-to-end test suite for CLI commands, using vitest and child_process to automate integration testing.
responsibilities: Creates isolated temporary directories for test execution using fs.mkdtempSync and os.tmpdir.
Defines a runCli helper that spawns the built CLI binary with given arguments and captures stdout, stderr, and exit code.
Writes wrapper scripts for prompts simulation to enable non-interactive CLI testing.
Executes a comprehensive set of test cases (37 tests across 7 files) validating CLI output, error handling, and command behavior.
Cleans up temporary directories after each test case using afterEach and fs operations.
Uses beforeAll to set up the test environment, including building wrapper scripts.
outOfScope: Unit testing of internal CLI logic.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts per the test-file-suffix rule.
All test processes must be spawned synchronously to ensure deterministic test execution.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide comprehensive automated E2E coverage for CLI commands to catch regressions before release.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Add E2E test suite for CLI commands with 37 tests across 7 files, as per commit 171f7b4.

English.role: End-to-end test suite for CLI commands, using vitest and child_process to automate integration testing.
responsibilities: Creates isolated temporary directories for test execution using fs.mkdtempSync and os.tmpdir.
Defines a runCli helper that spawns the built CLI binary with given arguments and captures stdout, stderr, and exit code.
Writes wrapper scripts for prompts simulation to enable non-interactive CLI testing.
Executes a comprehensive set of test cases (37 tests across 7 files) validating CLI output, error handling, and command behavior.
Cleans up temporary directories after each test case using afterEach and fs operations.
Uses beforeAll to set up the test environment, including building wrapper scripts.
outOfScope: Unit testing of internal CLI logic.

Simplified Chinese.role: CLI 命令的端到端测试套件，使用 vitest 和 child_process 自动化集成测试。
responsibilities: 使用 fs.mkdtempSync 和 os.tmpdir 创建隔离的临时目录用于测试执行。
定义 runCli 辅助函数，通过生成构建的 CLI 二进制文件并传入参数，捕获标准输出、标准错误和退出码。
编写用于模拟 prompts 的包装脚本，支持非交互式 CLI 测试。
执行全面的测试用例（7 个文件中包含 37 个测试），验证 CLI 输出、错误处理及命令行为。
在每个测试用例后使用 afterEach 和文件系统操作清理临时目录。
使用 beforeAll 设置测试环境，包括构建包装脚本。
outOfScope: 内部 CLI 逻辑的单元测试。
依赖外部服务的网络功能测试。
